sourceAmbiguity: A browser harness could accidentally mutate sandpit or integration provider state.
decisionTaken: Live mutation is disabled by default and requires explicit flag, target environment, secret references, named approver, selector snapshot, redaction, evidence checklist, and rollback snapshot.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: External provider configuration must be mock-first and gated-live.
operationalRisk: If removed, provider state can diverge from the manifest without audit or rollback posture.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Update data/analysis/202_environment_gate_and_evidence_checklist.json and rerun browser evidence before any live attempt.
